plannedFamilies.name: elegy-memory-v1
plannedFamilies.scope: Local non-authoritative import, list, show, export, supersede, and tombstone semantics only.

wrapperSurface.installExpectation: Wrapper installs stage contracts under contracts/, the dedicated CLI under bin/elegy-memory/, and the wrapper surface under wrappers/elegy-memory/.

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-mcp-v1
plannedFamilies.scope: Dedicated MCP descriptor authoring and analysis commands only.

wrapperSurface.installExpectation: Wrapper installs stage contracts under contracts/, the dedicated CLI under bin/elegy-mcp/, and the wrapper surface under wrappers/elegy-mcp/.

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-planning-v1
plannedFamilies.scope: Dedicated durable planning authority commands with scoped lifecycle transitions, revision, validation, and projection export.

wrapperSurface.installExpectation: Wrapper installs stage contracts under contracts/, the dedicated CLI under bin/elegy-planning/, and the wrapper surface under wrappers/elegy-planning/.

authorityReservations: downstream host-local policy and side-effect gating

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-skills-v1
plannedFamilies.scope: Dedicated governed skill-registry access and validation commands only.

wrapperSurface.installExpectation: Wrapper installs stage contracts under contracts/, the dedicated CLI under bin/elegy-skills/, and the wrapper surface under wrappers/elegy-skills/.

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-configuration-v1
plannedFamilies.scope: Deterministic materialization and verification of agentic configuration templates, profiles, and receipts for harness, repo, and workspace targets.

wrapperSurface.installExpectation: Wrapper installs stage contracts under contracts/, the dedicated CLI under bin/elegy-configuration/, and the wrapper surface under wrappers/elegy-configuration/.

authorityReservations: downstream hosts own release download, auth, trust, approvals, and runtime registration

entries.notes: Publishes bundle 1.6.0 as an additive update on the existing 1.x line: prior agent, capability, skill, MCP, invocation, observation, and memory contract families remain backward compatible, and the new elegy-configuration template/profile/receipt families plus local elegy-plugin-package/v2-backed configuration loading add governed deterministic agentic configuration materialization and verification without moving host runtime registration, release download, auth, approval, or trust authority into Elegy.
